title: Tick 9: mark C3 blocked on missing apex zone and ship C4 bearer-token auth on the Worker
question: Does the deployed outcomes-mcp Worker now require a bearer token at /mcp while keeping /healthz public and is C3 correctly marked blocked because the opensubagents.org apex is not in the operator's Cloudflare account?
success_criteria: QUEUE row C3 flipped to blocked with the runroc explaining that opensubagents.org is not present in account e6294e3ea89f8207af387d459824aaae
wrangler secret put MCP_BEARER_TOKEN uploads a 32-byte hex secret and wrangler deploy redeploys outcomes-mcp with the new auth gate at version 89b17bef
curl probes prove the matrix healthz public no-auth 401 valid-bearer 200 wrong-bearer 401 against the live worker URL
runroc outcomes runrocs C4-auth txt captures the four probe outcomes with timings and version id

capabilities: C3 blocked status recorded with a runroc that names the missing apex and lists candidate substitute zones already in inventory
MCP_BEARER_TOKEN secret bound to outcomes-mcp via wrangler secret put
outcomes-mcp redeployed at version 89b17bef with the bearer auth gate on the mcp path
four curl probes prove the auth matrix and are captured in the C4 runroc
